patterns_recognized: HARD CAP 1 (negative-edge GOLD) fires on 3 picks today — CIN@CLE (-19.45pp), TOR@DET (-20.73pp), ARI@COL (-2.76pp) — all correctly zeroing stake; validated 6+ times in archive, enforce unconditionally regardless of F-signal strength.

Pick-column parsing enforced verbatim from CSV: CHC@CHW shows pick=CHC (full_prob=0.4952 < 0.5 → away=CHC wins 50.48%), avoiding the 5/16 inversion error where Claude recorded CHC instead of the actual model pick of CHW.

Coors park f5_full_delta is a systematic park artifact: ARI@COL today shows COL wins F5 at 77.58% but ARI is the full-game pick; validated by 5/15 postgame (ARI won 9-1 despite similar delta) — suppress large f5_full_delta OVERRIDE triggers at Coors.

PLATINUM→GOLD DOWNGRADE applies when confidence_downgrade=True AND F1 carries a thin-sample asterisk, even when SP edge nominally agrees with the pick — the asterisk means the SP quality comparison is unreliable, reducing conviction (5/15 BOS@ATL validated this rule).

SF@OAK DIAMOND with all three F-signals aligned, no asterisk, f5_full_delta < 0.10, and no pipeline flags is the sole stakeable pick on the slate; the 5/16 DOWNGRADE triggers (high delta, confidence_downgrade, bullpen_fatigue) are entirely absent today.

MIA @ TB.reasoning: TB carries F1_xera_gap=2.28* (thin sample) with F-signal fire and PQI confirms (Δ=+27.4), satisfying HARD CAP 5's dual-signal requirement. Stage 1/2 agree (Δ=0.116). However, fair_prob is missing — the Odds API did not fire — which correctly caps grade at C and zeros the stake per market validation protocol. TB lineup (Caminero .812 OPS, Yandy Díaz .896 vs LHP) is solid. No qualitative context overrides the missing-fair_prob cap. CONFIRM C/stake=0.
lessons_applied: F1_xera_gap* thin-sample requires F-signal + PQI backup (HARD CAP 5) — satisfied
fair_prob missing correctly caps grade at C and zeros stake per market validation protocol

BAL @ WSH.reasoning: WSH at GOLD (B, score=2) via F3_swing_take_gap=2986.6. fair_prob=0.3896 is well below the 0.42 floor, correctly excluding all stake exposure. f5_full_delta=0.1907 means BAL dominates F5 (BAL wins 67.24%) — WSH's full-game thesis rests on bullpen leverage. hl_bullpen_xwoba_gap=-0.0072 (slight WSH bullpen edge). WSH has won this matchup 5/15 (3-2) and 5/16 (13-3). Fair_prob floor is authoritative; direction CONFIRM, stake excluded.
lessons_applied: fair_prob < 0.42 floor correctly excludes stake regardless of grade or F-signal
f5_full_delta=0.1907 (> 0.15) noted as bullpen-carry risk but insufficient to flip direction on a GOLD pick

PHI @ PIT.reasoning: PHI picked at GOLD but grade=D (-2): SP edge 1.66 xERA AGAINST pick (small sample, min_pa=95), PQI against (Δ=+5.8), Stage 1/2 sharply disagree (Δ=0.2508, PIT dominates F5 at 73.75%), bullpen_fatigue + confidence_downgrade stacked. PHI's full-game thesis requires a fatigued bullpen to overcome PIT's SP advantage — an extremely weak thesis already captured by the D grade. Model's own scoring correctly flags all structural headwinds. CONFIRM D/stake=0.
lessons_applied: D-grade with all structural signals against pick is the model's own SKIP designation — no Claude adjustment needed
Stage 1/2 disagree (Δ=0.25) + bullpen_fatigue + confidence_downgrade correctly produce D grade without requiring additional OVERRIDE

BOS @ ATL.reasoning: ATL is A-grade PLATINUM (score=5) with F1_xera_gap=1.88*, F2=0.030, F3=5823.2, SP edge +1.81 xERA agreeing. However, F1 carries the thin-sample asterisk and confidence_downgrade=True — warranting PLATINUM→GOLD reduction per the validated 5/15 rule. hl_bullpen_xwoba_gap=+0.0119 (BOS HL bullpen slightly better). Edge=+2.90pp is outside the [4,15]pp staking band regardless — no practical stake impact. Same matchup: 5/15 WIN (DOWNGRADE to GOLD), 5/16 LOSS (Claude re-elevated PLATINUM incorrectly). Direction ATL preserved; tier reduced.
lessons_applied: PLATINUM→GOLD when confidence_downgrade=True + F1* (thin sample asterisk) — validated 5/15 BOS@ATL WIN after DOWNGRADE
5/16 BOS@ATL loss: re-elevating PLATINUM over model's own tier constraints is a process failure — enforce DOWNGRADE consistently

CIN @ CLE.reasoning: CLE has strong F-signals (F1_xera_gap=2.13*, F5_bullpen_gap=+0.87, SP edge +1.78 xERA agrees, PQI=+29.7), but edge=-19.45pp triggers the large-negative-edge cap, zeroing all stake. f5_full_delta=0.2449: CLE dominates F5 (81.65%) but full-game only 57.16% — bullpen-carry thesis. hl_bullpen_xwoba_gap=+0.0186 (CIN HL bullpen slightly better). Same matchup: 5/15 LOSS, 5/16 DOWNGRADE-WIN. Negative edge is authoritative. CONFIRM B-/no stake.
lessons_applied: Large negative edge caps grade and zeros stake — authoritative regardless of F-signal strength
f5_full_delta=0.2449 notes bullpen-carry risk but HARD CAP 1 already handles stake exclusion

TOR @ DET.reasoning: [HARD CAP 1] fires immediately on edge=-20.73pp, dropping TOR from pre-cap B+ (score=3) to B- (score=1) and zeroing all stake. F1_xera_gap=2.38 (no asterisk), F3=4844.1, PQI confirms (Δ=-32.2) — strong F-signals but HARD CAP 1 overrides. bullpen_fatigue + confidence_downgrade stacked. DET home_lineup_concentration=1.549 (top-heavy; Riley Greene anchors). Same matchup: 5/15 LOSS (DET won 3-2), 5/16 DOWNGRADE-WIN (TOR won 2-1). HARD CAP 1 authoritative. CONFIRM B-/no stake.
lessons_applied: [HARD CAP 1] negative-edge GOLD/PLATINUM validated 6+ times — enforced unconditionally
high f5_full_delta DOWNGRADE on 5/16 was stake-sizing management only, direction proved correct — CONFIRM today without re-DOWNGRADE given delta=0.0865 (well below 0.15)

NYY @ NYM.reasoning: NYY at GOLD (B-, score=1): F2_xwoba_gap=0.027, edge=+13.31pp in band, Stage 1/2 tightly agree (Δ=0.0818). PQI against NYY (Δ=+11.2, late-game degradation), acute_roster=True, confidence_downgrade=True reduce grade to B-. pen_strain_pick_side=0.1152 (just above HIGH threshold) — NYY lineup (Aaron Judge 1.064/1.016 OPS) is dangerous against NYM's bullpen. Grade B- limits staking per grader rules regardless of edge being in band. No live SP matchup data available (vs_today_SP_OPS=null). CONFIRM B-/stake=0.
lessons_applied: B- grade correctly limits staking even with edge in band — grade threshold is the binding constraint here
pen_strain_pick_side HIGH (0.1152) supports NYY direction but not sufficient to upgrade tier

TEX @ HOU.reasoning: HOU graded A- (score=4): F3=3752.2, SP edge +0.95 xERA agrees, PQI confirms (Δ=+9.1). Edge=+18.43pp triggers SOFT CAP 6.5 (calibration_caution_18_25pp, half-Kelly applied), but edge exceeds the 15pp staking-band ceiling, setting stake_mult=0 per band rule. Yordan Alvarez (.975/.966 OPS, elite) anchors HOU's offense. TEX's Evan Carter has thin LHP sample (.250, 96 PA — LOW_SAMPLE). HOU won this matchup 5/15 and 5/16 consecutively. SOFT CAP 6.5 instruction: CONFIRM is acceptable with exposure capped. CONFIRM A-/no stake.
lessons_applied: SOFT CAP 6.5 (18-25pp edge band): CONFIRM is acceptable — conviction supported, exposure capped by band ceiling
edge > 15pp ceiling overrides kelly values, correctly setting stake_mult=0 regardless of grade

CHC @ CHW.reasoning: CSV pick column quoted directly: pick=CHC (full_prob=0.4952 < 0.5 → away=CHC wins 50.48%). Model grades this D (-4): no F-signals fire, SP edge 1.20 xERA AGAINST CHC, PQI against (Δ=+14.2), Stage 1/2 disagree (Δ=0.2284, CHW wins F5 at 72.35%). CHC's full-game pick (50.48%) is a near-coin flip with all structural signals favoring CHW. D-grade SKIP is fully justified. Note: this reverses from prior days where CHW was the model pick — pick column parsed verbatim to avoid 5/16 inversion error. CONFIRM D/SKIP.
lessons_applied: Pick column quoted verbatim from CSV before any reasoning — prevents 5/16 CHC@CHW inversion error
D grade (-4) with all signals against pick correctly produces SKIP; no stake and low directional confidence

MIL @ MIN.reasoning: PENDING_SP_DATA: Robert Gasser (MIL away SP) has 0 Statcast pitches season-to-date; pipeline requires 100+ to score. Without SP quality data the SP-edge feature is completely unreliable — the primary driver of directional accuracy in close matchups. MIL won a prior PENDING@MIN game 3-2 (5/15), illustrating genuine unpredictability. PENDING_SP_DATA protocol validated 7+ times in archive. No directional pick issued. CONFIRM PENDING.
lessons_applied: PENDING_SP_DATA protocol validated 7+ times — 0 Statcast pitches is a hard stop regardless of team quality or lineup signals

KC @ STL.reasoning: STL at GOLD (B-, score=1): F3=793.8, Stage 1/2 tightly aligned (Δ=0.0235). Edge=+0.69pp falls below the [4,15]pp floor — correctly excluded from staking. PQI against STL (Δ=-5.8) and confidence_downgrade=True are mild headwinds. STL has won this matchup 5/15 (5-4) and 5/16 (4-2) — two consecutive wins. hl_bullpen_xwoba_gap=-0.0018 (neutral). KC's Bobby Witt Jr. (.836/.850) is the key opposing bat. F3 supports STL direction but edge floor prevents any stake. CONFIRM B-.
lessons_applied: edge below 4pp band floor correctly zeros stake regardless of F3 signal or prior series wins
confidence_downgrade=True + PQI against do not mandate DOWNGRADE when f5_full_delta=0.0235 (well below 0.15) and F3 supports direction

ARI @ COL.reasoning: [HARD CAP 1] fires: edge=-2.76pp < 0 prevents GOLD confirmation (score 4→1, stake zeroed). ARI carries strong signals at Coors: SP edge +1.03 xERA agrees, PQI confirms (Δ=-19.9), F1_xera_gap=1.20* (thin sample). f5_full_delta=0.2265 — COL dominates F5 (COL wins 77.58%) — is a Coors park artifact (5/15 postgame: ARI won 9-1 despite similar delta via Coors bullpen collapse). confidence_downgrade=True. HARD CAP 1 authoritative; negative edge prevents staking. Coors pattern supports ARI direction. CONFIRM B-/no stake.
lessons_applied: [HARD CAP 1] enforced unconditionally — even at Coors where ARI direction is supported by park pattern
Coors f5_full_delta is a park artifact — f5_full_delta > 0.20 at COL does not trigger OVERRIDE, maintain market-aligned full-game direction

SF @ OAK.reasoning: OAK is the premier pick and sole stakeable game on the slate: DIAMOND/A (score=8), all three F-signals with confirmed quality — F1_xera_gap=2.55 (no asterisk), F2_xwoba_gap=0.032, F3=6046.4. SP edge +1.90 xERA agrees, PQI confirms (Δ=+31.8). f5_full_delta=0.1009 (tight, well below 0.15 threshold). Edge +7.48pp firmly in [4,15]pp band. No confidence_downgrade, no stress flags. Nick Kurtz (1.112 OPS vs RHP, 470 PA — OK) anchors OAK's offense. All 5/16 DOWNGRADE triggers (high delta, confidence_downgrade, bullpen_fatigue, SP edge unconfirmed) are entirely absent today. CONFIRM DIAMOND.
lessons_applied: DIAMOND with F1+F2+F3 all firing (no asterisk), f5_full_delta < 0.10, edge in band, no flags: validated 2-for-2 in archive (5/15 OAK 5-2 W)
5/16 OAK DOWNGRADE correctly applied then (f5_full_delta=0.2822 + confidence_downgrade + bullpen_fatigue) — none of those triggers apply today
pen_strain_pick_side=0.109 (MODERATE, just below HIGH): OAK's lineup is dangerous vs SF bullpen but not decisive — CONFIRM priori holds
